question: Quel est le chiffre d'affaires total ?
sql:
SELECT SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS ChiffreAffairesTotal 
FROM FactInternetSales F

question: Combien de commandes ont été passées au total ?
sql:
SELECT COUNT(SalesOrderNumber) AS NombreDeCommandes 
FROM FactInternetSales

question: Quel est le prix moyen des produits ?
sql:
SELECT AVG(P.ListPrice) AS PrixMoyen 
FROM DimProduct P

question: Quel est le revenu total par pays ?
sql:
SELECT DST.SalesTerritoryCountry AS Pays, SUM(FIS.SalesAmount) AS RevenuTotal
FROM FactInternetSales FIS
INNER JOIN DimSalesTerritory DST ON FIS.SalesTerritoryKey = DST.SalesTerritoryKey
GROUP BY DST.SalesTerritoryCountry
ORDER BY RevenuTotal DESC

question: Quelle est la quantité totale de produits vendus ?
sql:
SELECT SUM(F.OrderQuantity) AS QuantiteTotaleProduitsVendus
FROM FactInternetSales F

question: Combien y a-t-il de clients distincts ?
sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT F.CustomerKey) AS NombreDeClients 
FROM FactInternetSales F

question: Quel est le montant total des taxes collectées ?
sql:
SELECT SUM(F.TaxAmt) AS MontantTotalTaxesCollectees
FROM FactInternetSales F

question: Combien de produits différents ont été vendus ?
sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT P.ProductKey) AS NombreDeProduits
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimProduct P ON F.ProductKey = P.ProductKey

question: Quel est le chiffre d'affaires total par région de vente ?
sql:
SELECT T.SalesTerritoryRegion AS Region, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS ChiffreAffairesTotal
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimSalesTerritory T ON F.SalesTerritoryKey = T.SalesTerritoryKey
GROUP BY T.SalesTerritoryRegion
ORDER BY T.SalesTerritoryRegion

question: Quel est le coût total des produits vendus ?
sql:
SELECT SUM(F.TotalProductCost) AS CoutTotalProduitsVendus
FROM FactInternetSales F

question: Quels sont les 5 produits les plus vendus en quantité ?
sql:
SELECT TOP 5 P.EnglishProductName AS NomProduit, SUM(F.OrderQuantity) AS QuantiteVendue
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimProduct P ON F.ProductKey = P.ProductKey
GROUP BY P.EnglishProductName
ORDER BY QuantiteVendue DESC

question: Quels sont les 3 pays générant le plus de chiffre d'affaires ?
sql:
SELECT TOP 3 T.SalesTerritoryCountry AS Pays, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS CA
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimSalesTerritory T ON F.SalesTerritoryKey = T.SalesTerritoryKey
GROUP BY T.SalesTerritoryCountry
ORDER BY CA DESC

question: Quel est le produit le plus cher du catalogue ?
sql:
SELECT TOP 1 P.EnglishProductName AS NomProduit, P.ListPrice AS Prix
FROM DimProduct P
ORDER BY P.ListPrice DESC

question: Quels sont les 10 clients ayant dépensé le plus ?
sql:
SELECT TOP 10 C.FirstName + ' ' + C.LastName AS Client, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS DepenseTotale
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimCustomer C ON F.CustomerKey = C.CustomerKey
GROUP BY C.FirstName, C.LastName
ORDER BY DepenseTotale DESC

question: Quelle est la catégorie de produit la plus vendue ?
sql:
SELECT DPC.EnglishProductCategoryName AS CategorieProduit, SUM(F.OrderQuantity) AS QuantiteVendue
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimProduct DP ON F.ProductKey = DP.ProductKey
INNER JOIN DimProductSubcategory DPS ON DP.ProductSubcategoryKey = DPS.ProductSubcategoryKey
INNER JOIN DimProductCategory DPC ON DPS.ProductCategoryKey = DPC.ProductCategoryKey
GROUP BY DPC.EnglishProductCategoryName
ORDER BY QuantiteVendue DESC

question: Quels sont les 5 produits les moins vendus ?
sql:
SELECT TOP 5 P.EnglishProductName AS NomProduit, SUM(F.OrderQuantity) AS QuantiteVendue
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimProduct P ON F.ProductKey = P.ProductKey
GROUP BY P.EnglishProductName
ORDER BY QuantiteVendue ASC

question: Quel est le pays avec le panier moyen le plus élevé ?
sql:
SELECT T.SalesTerritoryCountry AS Pays, AVG(F.SalesAmount / F.OrderQuantity) AS PanierMoyen
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimSalesTerritory T ON F.SalesTerritoryKey = T.SalesTerritoryKey
GROUP BY T.SalesTerritoryCountry
ORDER BY PanierMoyen DESC

question: Quels sont les 3 groupes de territoire avec le plus de ventes ?
sql:
SELECT TOP 3 T.SalesTerritoryGroup AS GroupeTerritoire, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS TotalVentes
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimSalesTerritory T ON F.SalesTerritoryKey = T.SalesTerritoryKey
GROUP BY T.SalesTerritoryGroup
ORDER BY TotalVentes DESC

question: Quel est le produit ayant généré le plus de chiffre d'affaires ?
sql:
SELECT P.EnglishProductName AS NomProduit, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS CA
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimProduct P ON F.ProductKey = P.ProductKey
GROUP BY P.EnglishProductName
ORDER BY CA DESC

question: Quels sont les 5 clients ayant passé le plus de commandes ?
sql:
SELECT TOP 5 C.CustomerKey AS IdentifiantClient, C.FirstName AS Prenom, C.LastName AS Nom, COUNT(F.SalesOrderNumber) AS NombreCommandes
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimCustomer C ON F.CustomerKey = C.CustomerKey
GROUP BY C.CustomerKey, C.FirstName, C.LastName
ORDER BY NombreCommandes DESC

question: Quel est le chiffre d'affaires total en 2013 ?
sql:
SELECT SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS ChiffreAffairesTotal
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
WHERE D.CalendarYear = 2013

question: Quel est le revenu total par année ?
sql:
SELECT D.CalendarYear AS Annee, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS RevenuTotal
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
GROUP BY D.CalendarYear
ORDER BY D.CalendarYear

question: Quel est le chiffre d'affaires par trimestre en 2013 ?
sql:
SELECT D.CalendarQuarter AS Trimestre, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS ChiffreAffaires
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
WHERE D.CalendarYear = 2013
GROUP BY D.CalendarQuarter
ORDER BY D.CalendarQuarter

question: Combien de commandes ont été passées en 2012 ?
sql:
SELECT D.CalendarYear AS Annee, COUNT(F.SalesOrderNumber) AS NombreCommandes
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
WHERE D.CalendarYear = 2012
GROUP BY D.CalendarYear
ORDER BY D.CalendarYear

question: Quel mois a généré le plus de ventes en 2013 ?
sql:
SELECT TOP 1 D.EnglishMonthName AS Mois, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS TotalVentes
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
WHERE D.CalendarYear = 2013
GROUP BY D.EnglishMonthName, D.MonthNumberOfYear
ORDER BY TotalVentes DESC

question: Quel est le chiffre d'affaires par trimestre sur toutes les années ?
sql:
SELECT D.CalendarYear AS Annee, D.CalendarQuarter AS Trimestre, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS ChiffreDAffaires
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
GROUP BY D.CalendarYear, D.CalendarQuarter
ORDER BY D.CalendarYear, D.CalendarQuarter

question: Quelle année a généré le plus de revenus ?
sql:
SELECT TOP 1 D.CalendarYear AS Annee, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS RevenuTotal
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
GROUP BY D.CalendarYear
ORDER BY RevenuTotal DESC

question: Quel est le chiffre d'affaires mensuel en 2012 ?
sql:
SELECT D.EnglishMonthName AS Mois, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS CA
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
WHERE D.CalendarYear = 2012
GROUP BY D.EnglishMonthName, D.MonthNumberOfYear
ORDER BY D.MonthNumberOfYear

question: Combien de produits ont été vendus en 2011 ?
sql:
SELECT SUM(F.OrderQuantity) AS QuantiteVendue
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
WHERE D.CalendarYear = 2011

question: Quel est le revenu total par année et par pays ?
sql:
SELECT D.CalendarYear AS Annee, ST.SalesTerritoryCountry AS Pays, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS RevenuTotal
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
INNER JOIN DimSalesTerritory ST ON F.SalesTerritoryKey = ST.SalesTerritoryKey
GROUP BY D.CalendarYear, ST.SalesTerritoryCountry
ORDER BY D.CalendarYear, ST.SalesTerritoryCountry

question: Quel trimestre de 2012 a généré le plus de ventes ?
sql:
SELECT TOP 1 D.CalendarQuarter AS Trimestre, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS TotalVentes
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
WHERE D.CalendarYear = 2012
GROUP BY D.CalendarQuarter
ORDER BY TotalVentes DESC

question: Quel est le chiffre d'affaires total en 2011 et 2012 combinés ?
sql:
SELECT SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS CA_Total
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
WHERE D.CalendarYear IN (2011, 2012)

question: Quelle est l'évolution du chiffre d'affaires par année ?
sql:
SELECT D.CalendarYear AS Annee, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS ChiffreDAffaires
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
GROUP BY D.CalendarYear
ORDER BY D.CalendarYear

question: Quel mois a le plus de commandes sur toute la période ?
sql:
SELECT TOP 1 D.EnglishMonthName AS Mois, COUNT(F.SalesOrderNumber) AS NombreCommandes
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
GROUP BY D.EnglishMonthName, D.MonthNumberOfYear
ORDER BY NombreCommandes DESC

question: Quel est le revenu moyen par année ?
sql:
SELECT D.CalendarYear AS Annee, AVG(F.SalesAmount) AS RevenuMoyen
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
GROUP BY D.CalendarYear
ORDER BY D.CalendarYear

question: Quel est le chiffre d'affaires par catégorie de produit et par pays ?
sql:
SELECT 
  PC.EnglishProductCategoryName AS CategorieProduit, 
  ST.SalesTerritoryCountry AS Pays, 
  SUM(FIS.SalesAmount) AS ChiffreAffaires
FROM 
  FactInternetSales FIS
INNER JOIN 
  DimProduct DP ON FIS.ProductKey = DP.ProductKey
INNER JOIN 
  DimProductSubcategory DPS ON DP.ProductSubcategoryKey = DPS.ProductSubcategoryKey
INNER JOIN 
  DimProductCategory PC ON DPS.ProductCategoryKey = PC.ProductCategoryKey
INNER JOIN 
  DimSalesTerritory ST ON FIS.SalesTerritoryKey = ST.SalesTerritoryKey
INNER JOIN 
  DimDate D ON FIS.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
GROUP BY 
  PC.EnglishProductCategoryName, 
  ST.SalesTerritoryCountry
ORDER BY 
  PC.EnglishProductCategoryName, 
  ST.SalesTerritoryCountry

question: Quels sont les clients ayant dépensé plus de 5000 au total ?
sql:
SELECT DC.FirstName AS Prenom, DC.LastName AS Nom, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS DepenseTotale
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimCustomer DC ON F.CustomerKey = DC.CustomerKey
GROUP BY DC.FirstName, DC.LastName
HAVING SUM(F.SalesAmount) > 5000
ORDER BY DepenseTotale DESC

question: Quelle est la marge moyenne (prix de vente moins coût) par catégorie de produit ?
sql:
SELECT 
  DPC.EnglishProductCategoryName AS CategorieProduit, 
  AVG(F.UnitPrice - DP.StandardCost) AS MargeMoyenne
FROM 
  FactInternetSales F
  INNER JOIN DimProduct DP ON F.ProductKey = DP.ProductKey
  INNER JOIN DimProductSubcategory DPS ON DP.ProductSubcategoryKey = DPS.ProductSubcategoryKey
  INNER JOIN DimProductCategory DPC ON DPS.ProductCategoryKey = DPC.ProductCategoryKey
GROUP BY 
  DPC.EnglishProductCategoryName
ORDER BY 
  DPC.EnglishProductCategoryName

question: Quel est le revenu moyen par commande, par pays ?
sql:
SELECT DST.SalesTerritoryCountry AS Pays, AVG(F.SalesAmount) AS RevenuMoyenParCommande
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimSalesTerritory DST ON F.SalesTerritoryKey = DST.SalesTerritoryKey
GROUP BY DST.SalesTerritoryCountry
ORDER BY RevenuMoyenParCommande DESC

question: Quels produits n'ont jamais été vendus ?
sql:
SELECT P.EnglishProductName AS NomProduit
FROM DimProduct P
LEFT JOIN FactInternetSales F ON P.ProductKey = F.ProductKey
WHERE F.ProductKey IS NULL

question: Quel est le chiffre d'affaires par sous-catégorie de produit ?
sql:
SELECT 
  DPCM.EnglishProductSubcategoryName AS SousCategorie,
  SUM(FIS.SalesAmount) AS ChiffreAffaires
FROM 
  FactInternetSales FIS
  INNER JOIN DimProduct DP ON FIS.ProductKey = DP.ProductKey
  INNER JOIN DimProductSubcategory DPCM ON DP.ProductSubcategoryKey = DPCM.ProductSubcategoryKey
GROUP BY 
  DPCM.EnglishProductSubcategoryName
ORDER BY 
  ChiffreAffaires DESC

question: Quels clients ont acheté des produits de toutes les catégories ?
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT DC.FirstName AS PrenomClient, DC.LastName AS NomClient
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimProduct DP ON F.ProductKey = DP.ProductKey
INNER JOIN DimProductSubcategory DPS ON DP.ProductSubcategoryKey = DPS.ProductSubcategoryKey
INNER JOIN DimProductCategory DPC ON DPS.ProductCategoryKey = DPC.ProductCategoryKey
INNER JOIN DimCustomer DC ON F.CustomerKey = DC.CustomerKey
GROUP BY DC.FirstName, DC.LastName, DC.CustomerKey
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT DPC.EnglishProductCategoryName) = (SELECT COUNT(EnglishProductCategoryName) FROM DimProductCategory)

question: Quel est le revenu total par catégorie et par année ?
sql:
SELECT D.CalendarYear AS Annee, PC.EnglishProductCategoryName AS Categorie, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS RevenuTotal
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimProduct P ON F.ProductKey = P.ProductKey
INNER JOIN DimProductSubcategory PS ON P.ProductSubcategoryKey = PS.ProductSubcategoryKey
INNER JOIN DimProductCategory PC ON PS.ProductCategoryKey = PC.ProductCategoryKey
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
GROUP BY D.CalendarYear, PC.EnglishProductCategoryName
ORDER BY D.CalendarYear, PC.EnglishProductCategoryName

question: Quelle est la quantité moyenne commandée par pays ?
sql:
SELECT DST.SalesTerritoryCountry AS Pays, AVG(F.OrderQuantity) AS QuantiteMoyenneCommandee
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimSalesTerritory DST ON F.SalesTerritoryKey = DST.SalesTerritoryKey
GROUP BY DST.SalesTerritoryCountry
ORDER BY DST.SalesTerritoryCountry

question: Quels sont les produits vendus uniquement en 2013 ?
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT P.EnglishProductName AS NomProduit
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
INNER JOIN DimProduct P ON F.ProductKey = P.ProductKey
WHERE D.CalendarYear = 2013
AND P.ProductKey NOT IN (
  SELECT F2.ProductKey
  FROM FactInternetSales F2
  INNER JOIN DimDate D2 ON F2.OrderDateKey = D2.DateKey
  WHERE D2.CalendarYear <> 2013
)

question: Quel est le chiffre d'affaires par groupe de territoire et par année ?
sql:
SELECT T.SalesTerritoryGroup AS GroupeTerritoire, D.CalendarYear AS Annee, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS ChiffreAffaires
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimDate D ON F.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
INNER JOIN DimSalesTerritory T ON F.SalesTerritoryKey = T.SalesTerritoryKey
GROUP BY T.SalesTerritoryGroup, D.CalendarYear
ORDER BY T.SalesTerritoryGroup, D.CalendarYear

question: Quels clients ont dépensé plus que la moyenne des clients ?
sql:
SELECT C.FirstName AS Prenom, C.LastName AS Nom, SUM(F.SalesAmount) AS MontantDepense
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimCustomer C ON F.CustomerKey = C.CustomerKey
GROUP BY C.FirstName, C.LastName
HAVING SUM(F.SalesAmount) > (SELECT AVG(TotalDepense) FROM (SELECT CustomerKey, SUM(SalesAmount) AS TotalDepense FROM FactInternetSales GROUP BY CustomerKey) AS T)
ORDER BY MontantDepense DESC

question: Quel est le nombre de commandes par catégorie de produit ?
sql:
SELECT 
  DPC.EnglishProductCategoryName AS CategorieProduit,
  COUNT(F.ProductKey) AS NombreCommandes
FROM 
  FactInternetSales F
  INNER JOIN DimProduct DP ON F.ProductKey = DP.ProductKey
  INNER JOIN DimProductSubcategory DPS ON DP.ProductSubcategoryKey = DPS.ProductSubcategoryKey
  INNER JOIN DimProductCategory DPC ON DPS.ProductCategoryKey = DPC.ProductCategoryKey
GROUP BY 
  DPC.EnglishProductCategoryName
ORDER BY 
  NombreCommandes DESC

question: Quelle sous-catégorie a la marge unitaire la plus élevée ?
sql:
SELECT PS.EnglishProductSubcategoryName AS SousCategorie, (SUM(F.SalesAmount) - SUM(F.TotalProductCost)) / SUM(F.OrderQuantity) AS MargeUnitaire
FROM FactInternetSales F
INNER JOIN DimProduct P ON F.ProductKey = P.ProductKey
INNER JOIN DimProductSubcategory PS ON P.ProductSubcategoryKey = PS.ProductSubcategoryKey
GROUP BY PS.EnglishProductSubcategoryName
ORDER BY MargeUnitaire DESC

question: Quel est le top 5 des produits par revenu pour chaque pays ?
sql:
SELECT TOP 5 DST.SalesTerritoryCountry AS Pays, DP.EnglishProductName AS NomProduit, SUM(FIS.SalesAmount) AS Revenu
FROM FactInternetSales FIS
INNER JOIN DimProduct DP ON FIS.ProductKey = DP.ProductKey
INNER JOIN DimDate DD ON FIS.OrderDateKey = DD.DateKey
INNER JOIN DimSalesTerritory DST ON FIS.SalesTerritoryKey = DST.SalesTerritoryKey
GROUP BY DST.SalesTerritoryCountry, DP.EnglishProductName
ORDER BY Revenu DESC
